title: Numbers & Time
shortSummary: Count, tell the time, and handle dates and prices, the numbers you need every single day.
culturalNote: Germans famously value punctuality. Being on time means arriving a few minutes early, and being late without warning is considered disrespectful. Note two quirks: German says numbers above twenty 'back to front', so 21 is einundzwanzig (one-and-twenty). And the 24-hour clock is standard for schedules, timetables, and appointments, so 8pm is 20 Uhr.

keyPhrases.context: Telling the time on the hour
Careful: halb vier means half TO four, i.e. 3:30

grammar.explanation: From 21 onward, German says the units before the tens, joined by 'und' (and). So 21 is einundzwanzig, 45 is fünfundvierzig (five-and-forty).
grammar.commonMistake: Saying the numbers in English order: it is einundzwanzig, not zwanzigeins.

grammar.rule: halb means half TO the hour
grammar.explanation: German counts toward the next hour. 'halb drei' means half to three, which is 2:30, not 3:30. This trips up almost every learner.

examples.de: Wir treffen uns um halb acht.
examples.en: We meet at half past seven (7:30).

grammar.commonMistake: Reading halb drei as 3:30. It actually means 2:30.

dialogue.setup: Lena calls the cinema to ask about a film showing this evening.

lines.speaker: Lena
lines.german: Guten Tag, um wie viel Uhr beginnt der Film?
lines.english: Hello, at what time does the film start?

lines.speaker: Kasse
lines.german: Guten Tag. Der Film beginnt um halb neun.
lines.english: Hello. The film starts at half past eight (8:30).

lines.speaker: Lena
lines.german: Und wie viel kostet eine Karte?
lines.english: And how much does a ticket cost?

lines.speaker: Lena
lines.german: Gut. Ich nehme zwei Karten, bitte.
lines.english: Good. I'll take two tickets, please.

lines.speaker: Lena
lines.english: Thank you very much. See you later!

quiz.question: How do you say 'twenty-one' in German?
What time is 'halb drei'?
quiz.explanation: German counts toward the next hour, so halb drei is half to three, which is 2:30.

quiz.question: Wie _____ ist es? (asking the time)
quiz.explanation: Wie spät ist es? literally means 'how late is it?'.

quiz.question: Which phrase asks the price?
quiz.explanation: Wie viel kostet das? means 'how much does that cost?'.

quiz.question: Arrange: kostet / das / viel / wie
quiz.explanation: The question word 'wie viel' starts, then the verb kostet, then das.
